title: Homura Lightning Enchantment
body:
This content was translated by AI. Adds a Lightning Enchantment to Minecraft. Obtained via: Enchanting Table (Sword), Villager Trades, Fishing. Effective on: Swords.
Max level:five.
Advantages:
1.The lightning strike triggered upon attack is purely visual—it won’t destroy mob drops, start fires, or damage the player.
2.After attacking, it adds 1 × level points of lightning damage. This damage is applied during the final damage calculation and cannot be negated by hit cooldowns.
3.Ignites the target for 1 second upon hit. Animals killed while burning drop cooked food. Fully compatible with the vanilla Looting enchantment. Due to the extremely short burn duration, the target rarely sets the player on fire in actual combat.
Disadvantage:Since the lightning is purely cosmetic, attacking Creepers or Villagers will not transform them into Charged Creepers or Witches, respectively.
